name: Neonode Inc.
business: Neonode provides software solutions for machine perception using machine learning algorithms and optical sensing solutions for touch and gesture. The company licenses its technology to OEMs and automotive Tier 1 suppliers, primarily in the automotive and printer markets. It also offers non-recurring engineering services.

exposures.sentence: Neonode provides software solutions for machine perception that feature advanced machine learning algorithms to detect and track persons and objects in video streams from cameras and other types of imagers.
Neonode also provides advanced optical sensing solutions for touch, contactless touch, and gesture sensing using our zForce technology platform.
We market and sell our solutions to customers mainly in the automotive market.

We are no longer selling the zForce technology to new customers but will continue supporting existing customers in various markets and segments such as office equipment, automotive, industrial automation, medical, military, and avionics.
